creator: mmatalka@gmail.com
text:
I've got a few more things to try and I need to redo them more structured, but so far no luck.  One challenge is the USB stack gets a bit funky after the first use.  And the microphone shows up differently depending on if I have it plugged in during boot vs after.  I don't know if those are related or not, but I have a bunch of permutations to try.

Thank you for the help.
